title: Nvidia is sending GPUs to the moon
excerpt: If there's a place in the universe without GPUs, Nvidia is sending them there.
content_html:
Nvidia’s effort to deploy its GPUs far and wide is aiming at a new target: the moon.

Lunar Outpost, a startup building robotics for space infrastructure, announced on Thursday that its next moon rover will use Jetson chips to control its lidar system. When it does, it is likely to be the first GPU on the lunar surface.

“We’re taking the Nvidia Jetson and comparing it to our flight compute platform that has a little bit more spaceflight heritage,” Lunar Outpost CEO Justin Cyrus said. “[We’re] seeing what the pros are, seeing what the cons are. And we’re really pushing towards trying to adopt these more capable GPU-powered systems in these extreme environments.”

NASA has launched a campaign to pay private companies to explore the lunar surface ahead of plans to return human astronauts, perhaps as soon as 2028. The space agency’s program, modeled on its work with SpaceX, asks tech companies to develop vehicles that carry scientific sensors to the moon to understand its terrain and hunt for substances like water that could prove useful or even lucrative to exploit.

Nvidia also recently announced a partnership with Firefly Aerospace, the first private company to safely land a robot on the moon, that will see the Jetson platform operate on a satellite orbiting the moon to process imagery. That satellite aims to collect data for scientists trying to map the moon, but also to track the growing number of robots on the surface.

Lunar Outpost’s next rover is packaged onboard a lander built by Intuitive Machines, another moon-focused tech company. The rover is designed to carry a package of sensors into craters and other places that are difficult to explore from orbit. The following mission will be exploring a place on the lunar surface called Reiner Gamma, where a magnetic anomaly has puzzled scientists.

Each mission is expected to take flight on a Falcon 9 rocket before the end of the year.

Nvidia’s Jetson platform isn’t as well known as AI workhorses like Blackwell and Vera Rubin, but it’s a vital part of many physical AI systems. Designed to be compact and power-efficient, Jetson lets robotic systems process sensor inputs locally, allowing them to understand and react to the world around them more quickly.

“Our autonomy stack was a bit more deterministic five years ago, and now it’s a combination of deterministic and physical AI, which is pretty fun,” Cyrus said. “We still run both in parallel, and then it’s our job to figure out where physical AI can actually plug into our stack and help us do things that no one’s done before.”

Using GPUs in space is challenging because of the extreme environment. Most space-faring GPUs are in orbit close to the Earth, where they are relatively protected from radiation and dramatic temperature changes. The moon is more directly exposed to cosmic radiation and swings in temperature as it goes through its phases.

“Your system has to survive lunar night and has to do so on very low power,” Cyrus said.

If they can operate the chips in that environment, Lunar Outpost’s engineers hope that their vehicles will be more capable — able to more quickly process their environment and make decisions. NASA has extensive ambitions for a sustained human presence on the moon, but that will likely require autonomous systems to pave the way and do the heavy lifting.

“What we at Lunar Outpost are currently working on is how do we go from exploration to permanence, how do we actually build that outpost on the moon?” Cyrus said. “We do think combining our deterministic models plus the physical AI layer — that’s what allows us to make a human presence in space sustainable, actually having that robotic workforce.”

In the next few years, Lunar Outpost has several smaller autonomous rovers scheduled for launch to the moon, and one larger one, Pegasus, that is intended to carry astronauts. Pegasus is waiting on a rocket built by Jeff Bezos’ space company, Blue Origin, to carry it to the moon, but that launch vehicle suffered an anomaly this summer and it’s not clear when it will return to flight.

“It does seem like they’re making pretty darn good progress on the pad,” Cyrus said. “I can’t really answer Blue Origin’s timelines or NASA’s timelines on the pad reconstruction, but everything we’ve been told, we’re on the same timeline [for 2028].”

That leaves futuristic visions of space data centers and fleets of robots at work on the moon both waiting on the same thing: a bigger rocket.

When you purchase through links in our articles, we may earn a small commission. This doesn’t affect our editorial independence.

Tim Fernholz is a journalist who writes about technology, finance and public policy. He has closely covered the rise of the private space industry and is the author of Rocket Billionaires: Elon Musk, Jeff Bezos and the New Space Race. Formerly, he was a senior reporter at Quartz, the global business news site, for more than a decade, and began his career as a political reporter in Washington, D.C. You can contact or verify outreach from Tim by emailing tim.fernholz@techcrunch.com or via an encrypted message to tim_fernholz.21 on Signal.

sentences.zh: Nvidia 广泛部署 GPU 的努力瞄准了一个新目标：月球。

blocks.html_en: Lunar Outpost, a startup building robotics for space infrastructure, announced on Thursday that its next moon rover will use Jetson chips to control its lidar system. When it does, it is likely to be the first GPU on the lunar surface.

sentences.zh: Lunar Outpost 是一家为太空基础设施制造机器人的初创公司，周四宣布其下一个月球车将使用 Jetson 芯片来控制其激光雷达系统。

sentences.en: When it does, it is likely to be the first GPU on the lunar surface.

And we’re really pushing towards trying to adopt these more capable GPU-powered systems in these extreme environments.”

sentences.en: “[We’re] seeing what the pros are, seeing what the cons are.
sentences.zh: “[我们]正在看到优点是什么，看看缺点是什么。

sentences.en: And we’re really pushing towards trying to adopt these more capable GPU-powered systems in these extreme environments.”
sentences.zh: 我们确实正在努力尝试在这些极端环境中采用这些功能更强大的 GPU 驱动的系统。”

blocks.html_en: NASA has launched a campaign to pay private companies to explore the lunar surface ahead of plans to return human astronauts, perhaps as soon as 2028. The space agency’s program, modeled on its work with SpaceX, asks tech companies to develop vehicles that carry scientific sensors to the moon to understand its terrain and hunt for substances like water that could prove useful or even lucrative to exploit.

sentences.en: NASA has launched a campaign to pay private companies to explore the lunar surface ahead of plans to return human astronauts, perhaps as soon as 2028.
sentences.zh: 美国宇航局 (NASA) 发起了一项活动，向私营公司支付费用，让他们在载人宇航员返回月球表面的计划（最早可能在 2028 年）之前进行探索。

sentences.en: The space agency’s program, modeled on its work with SpaceX, asks tech companies to develop vehicles that carry scientific sensors to the moon to understand its terrain and hunt for substances like water that could prove useful or even lucrative to exploit.
sentences.zh: 该航天局的计划以与 SpaceX 的合作为蓝本，要求科技公司开发将科学传感器带到月球的飞行器，以了解月球的地形，并寻找水等可能有用甚至有利可图的物质。

blocks.html_en: Nvidia also recently announced a partnership with Firefly Aerospace, the first private company to safely land a robot on the moon, that will see the Jetson platform operate on a satellite orbiting the moon to process imagery. That satellite aims to collect data for scientists trying to map the moon, but also to track the growing number of robots on the surface.

sentences.en: Nvidia also recently announced a partnership with Firefly Aerospace, the first private company to safely land a robot on the moon, that will see the Jetson platform operate on a satellite orbiting the moon to process imagery.
sentences.zh: Nvidia 最近还宣布与 Firefly Aerospace 建立合作伙伴关系，Firefly Aerospace 是第一家将机器人安全降落在月球上的私营公司，Jetson 平台将在绕月运行的卫星上运行以处理图像。

sentences.en: That satellite aims to collect data for scientists trying to map the moon, but also to track the growing number of robots on the surface.
sentences.zh: 该卫星旨在为试图绘制月球地图的科学家收集数据，同时也跟踪月球表面数量不断增加的机器人。

blocks.html_en: Lunar Outpost’s next rover is packaged onboard a lander built by Intuitive Machines, another moon-focused tech company. The rover is designed to carry a package of sensors into craters and other places that are difficult to explore from orbit. The following mission will be exploring a place on the lunar surface called Reiner Gamma, where a magnetic anomaly has puzzled scientists.

sentences.en: Lunar Outpost’s next rover is packaged onboard a lander built by Intuitive Machines, another moon-focused tech company.
sentences.zh: 月球前哨站的下一个月球车安装在另一家专注于月球的科技公司 Intuitive Machines 建造的着陆器上。

sentences.en: The rover is designed to carry a package of sensors into craters and other places that are difficult to explore from orbit.
sentences.zh: 该漫游车的设计目的是将一组传感器携带到陨石坑和其他难以从轨道探索的地方。

sentences.en: The following mission will be exploring a place on the lunar surface called Reiner Gamma, where a magnetic anomaly has puzzled scientists.
sentences.zh: 接下来的任务将探索月球表面一个名为莱纳伽玛的地方，那里的磁异常让科学家们感到困惑。

blocks.html_en: Each mission is expected to take flight on a Falcon 9 rocket before the end of the year.

sentences.en: Each mission is expected to take flight on a Falcon 9 rocket before the end of the year.
sentences.zh: 每项任务预计将在今年年底前使用猎鹰 9 号火箭发射。

blocks.html_en: Nvidia’s Jetson platform isn’t as well known as AI workhorses like Blackwell and Vera Rubin, but it’s a vital part of many physical AI systems. Designed to be compact and power-efficient, Jetson lets robotic systems process sensor inputs locally, allowing them to understand and react to the world around them more quickly.

sentences.en: Nvidia’s Jetson platform isn’t as well known as AI workhorses like Blackwell and Vera Rubin, but it’s a vital part of many physical AI systems.
sentences.zh: Nvidia 的 Jetson 平台并不像 Blackwell 和 Vera Rubin 等人工智能主力那样出名，但它是许多物理人工智能系统的重要组成部分。

sentences.en: Designed to be compact and power-efficient, Jetson lets robotic systems process sensor inputs locally, allowing them to understand and react to the world around them more quickly.
sentences.zh: Jetson 设计紧凑且节能，可让机器人系统在本地处理传感器输入，从而使它们能够更快地了解周围的世界并对其做出反应。

blocks.html_en: “Our autonomy stack was a bit more deterministic five years ago, and now it’s a combination of deterministic and physical AI, which is pretty fun,” Cyrus said. “We still run both in parallel, and then it’s our job to figure out where physical AI can actually plug into our stack and help us do things that no one’s done before.”

sentences.en: “Our autonomy stack was a bit more deterministic five years ago, and now it’s a combination of deterministic and physical AI, which is pretty fun,” Cyrus said.
sentences.zh: “五年前，我们的自主堆栈更具确定性，而现在它是确定性人工智能和物理人工智能的结合，这非常有趣，”赛勒斯说。

sentences.en: “We still run both in parallel, and then it’s our job to figure out where physical AI can actually plug into our stack and help us do things that no one’s done before.”
sentences.zh: “我们仍然并行运行两者，然后我们的工作就是找出物理人工智能实际上可以插入到我们的堆栈中并帮助我们做以前没有人做过的事情。”

blocks.html_en: Using GPUs in space is challenging because of the extreme environment. Most space-faring GPUs are in orbit close to the Earth, where they are relatively protected from radiation and dramatic temperature changes. The moon is more directly exposed to cosmic radiation and swings in temperature as it goes through its phases.

sentences.en: Using GPUs in space is challenging because of the extreme environment.
sentences.zh: 由于环境极端，在太空中使用 GPU 具有挑战性。

sentences.en: Most space-faring GPUs are in orbit close to the Earth, where they are relatively protected from radiation and dramatic temperature changes.
sentences.zh: 大多数太空 GPU 都位于靠近地球的轨道上，相对而言，它们免受辐射和剧烈温度变化的影响。

sentences.en: The moon is more directly exposed to cosmic radiation and swings in temperature as it goes through its phases.
sentences.zh: 月球更直接地暴露在宇宙辐射下，并且在其变化过程中温度也会发生波动。

blocks.html_en: “Your system has to survive lunar night and has to do so on very low power,” Cyrus said.

sentences.en: “Your system has to survive lunar night and has to do so on very low power,” Cyrus said.
sentences.zh: 赛勒斯说：“你的系统必须能够在月球夜晚生存，并且必须以非常低的功率做到这一点。”

blocks.html_en: If they can operate the chips in that environment, Lunar Outpost’s engineers hope that their vehicles will be more capable — able to more quickly process their environment and make decisions. NASA has extensive ambitions for a sustained human presence on the moon, but that will likely require autonomous systems to pave the way and do the heavy lifting.

sentences.en: If they can operate the chips in that environment, Lunar Outpost’s engineers hope that their vehicles will be more capable — able to more quickly process their environment and make decisions.
sentences.zh: 如果他们能够在这种环境中运行芯片，月球前哨站的工程师希望他们的车辆能够更有能力——能够更快地处理环境并做出决策。

sentences.en: NASA has extensive ambitions for a sustained human presence on the moon, but that will likely require autonomous systems to pave the way and do the heavy lifting.
sentences.zh: 美国宇航局对人类在月球上持续存在有着巨大的野心，但这可能需要自主系统来铺平道路并承担繁重的任务。

blocks.html_en: “What we at Lunar Outpost are currently working on is how do we go from exploration to permanence, how do we actually build that outpost on the moon?” Cyrus said. “We do think combining our deterministic models plus the physical AI layer — that’s what allows us to make a human presence in space sustainable, actually having that robotic workforce.”

sentences.en: “What we at Lunar Outpost are currently working on is how do we go from exploration to permanence, how do we actually build that outpost on the moon?”
sentences.zh: “我们月球前哨站目前正在研究的是如何从探索走向永久，我们如何在月球上真正建立那个前哨站？”

sentences.en: Cyrus said.
sentences.zh: 赛勒斯说。

sentences.en: “We do think combining our deterministic models plus the physical AI layer — that’s what allows us to make a human presence in space sustainable, actually having that robotic workforce.”
sentences.zh: “我们确实认为将我们的确定性模型与物理人工智能层相结合——这使我们能够使人类在太空中可持续存在，实际上拥有机器人劳动力。”

blocks.html_en: In the next few years, Lunar Outpost has several smaller autonomous rovers scheduled for launch to the moon, and one larger one, Pegasus, that is intended to carry astronauts. Pegasus is waiting on a rocket built by Jeff Bezos’ space company, Blue Origin, to carry it to the moon, but that launch vehicle suffered an anomaly this summer and it’s not clear when it will return to flight.

sentences.en: In the next few years, Lunar Outpost has several smaller autonomous rovers scheduled for launch to the moon, and one larger one, Pegasus, that is intended to carry astronauts.
sentences.zh: 在接下来的几年中，月球前哨站计划将几辆较小的自主漫游车发射到月球，还有一辆较大的自主漫游车“飞马座”，旨在运载宇航员。

sentences.en: Pegasus is waiting on a rocket built by Jeff Bezos’ space company, Blue Origin, to carry it to the moon, but that launch vehicle suffered an anomaly this summer and it’s not clear when it will return to flight.
sentences.zh: 飞马座正在等待杰夫·贝佐斯的太空公司蓝色起源制造的火箭将其送上月球，但该运载火箭今年夏天出现异常，目前尚不清楚它何时会返回飞行。

blocks.html_en: “It does seem like they’re making pretty darn good progress on the pad,” Cyrus said. “I can’t really answer Blue Origin’s timelines or NASA’s timelines on the pad reconstruction, but everything we’ve been told, we’re on the same timeline [for 2028].”

sentences.en: “It does seem like they’re making pretty darn good progress on the pad,” Cyrus said.
sentences.zh: “看起来他们在垫子上确实取得了非常好的进展，”赛勒斯说。

sentences.en: “I can’t really answer Blue Origin’s timelines or NASA’s timelines on the pad reconstruction, but everything we’ve been told, we’re on the same timeline [for 2028].”
sentences.zh: “我无法真正回答蓝色起源的时间表或 NASA 的发射台重建时间表，但我们被告知的一切，我们都在同一时间表上（2028 年）。”

blocks.html_en: That leaves futuristic visions of space data centers and fleets of robots at work on the moon both waiting on the same thing: a bigger rocket.

sentences.en: That leaves futuristic visions of space data centers and fleets of robots at work on the moon both waiting on the same thing: a bigger rocket.
sentences.zh: 这就留下了太空数据中心和月球上工作的机器人舰队的未来愿景，它们都在等待同一件事：更大的火箭。

content_html_zh:
Nvidia 广泛部署 GPU 的努力瞄准了一个新目标：月球。

Lunar Outpost 是一家为太空基础设施制造机器人的初创公司，周四宣布其下一个月球车将使用 Jetson 芯片来控制其激光雷达系统。 当它实现时，它很可能是月球表面的第一个 GPU。

Lunar Outpost 首席执行官贾斯汀·赛勒斯 (Justin Cyrus) 表示：“我们正在将 Nvidia Jetson 与我们的飞行计算平台进行比较，后者具有更多的航天传统。” “[我们]正在看到优点是什么，看看缺点是什么。 我们确实正在努力尝试在这些极端环境中采用这些功能更强大的 GPU 驱动的系统。”

美国宇航局 (NASA) 发起了一项活动，向私营公司支付费用，让他们在载人宇航员返回月球表面的计划（最早可能在 2028 年）之前进行探索。 该航天局的计划以与 SpaceX 的合作为蓝本，要求科技公司开发将科学传感器带到月球的飞行器，以了解月球的地形，并寻找水等可能有用甚至有利可图的物质。

Nvidia 最近还宣布与 Firefly Aerospace 建立合作伙伴关系，Firefly Aerospace 是第一家将机器人安全降落在月球上的私营公司，Jetson 平台将在绕月运行的卫星上运行以处理图像。 该卫星旨在为试图绘制月球地图的科学家收集数据，同时也跟踪月球表面数量不断增加的机器人。

月球前哨站的下一个月球车安装在另一家专注于月球的科技公司 Intuitive Machines 建造的着陆器上。 该漫游车的设计目的是将一组传感器携带到陨石坑和其他难以从轨道探索的地方。 接下来的任务将探索月球表面一个名为莱纳伽玛的地方，那里的磁异常让科学家们感到困惑。

每项任务预计将在今年年底前使用猎鹰 9 号火箭发射。

Nvidia 的 Jetson 平台并不像 Blackwell 和 Vera Rubin 等人工智能主力那样出名，但它是许多物理人工智能系统的重要组成部分。 Jetson 设计紧凑且节能，可让机器人系统在本地处理传感器输入，从而使它们能够更快地了解周围的世界并对其做出反应。

“五年前，我们的自主堆栈更具确定性，而现在它是确定性人工智能和物理人工智能的结合，这非常有趣，”赛勒斯说。 “我们仍然并行运行两者，然后我们的工作就是找出物理人工智能实际上可以插入到我们的堆栈中并帮助我们做以前没有人做过的事情。”

由于环境极端，在太空中使用 GPU 具有挑战性。 大多数太空 GPU 都位于靠近地球的轨道上，相对而言，它们免受辐射和剧烈温度变化的影响。 月球更直接地暴露在宇宙辐射下，并且在其变化过程中温度也会发生波动。

赛勒斯说：“你的系统必须能够在月球夜晚生存，并且必须以非常低的功率做到这一点。”

如果他们能够在这种环境中运行芯片，月球前哨站的工程师希望他们的车辆能够更有能力——能够更快地处理环境并做出决策。 美国宇航局对人类在月球上持续存在有着巨大的野心，但这可能需要自主系统来铺平道路并承担繁重的任务。

“我们月球前哨站目前正在研究的是如何从探索走向永久，我们如何在月球上真正建立那个前哨站？” 赛勒斯说。 “我们确实认为将我们的确定性模型与物理人工智能层相结合——这使我们能够使人类在太空中可持续存在，实际上拥有机器人劳动力。”

在接下来的几年中，月球前哨站计划将几辆较小的自主漫游车发射到月球，还有一辆较大的自主漫游车“飞马座”，旨在运载宇航员。 飞马座正在等待杰夫·贝佐斯的太空公司蓝色起源制造的火箭将其送上月球，但该运载火箭今年夏天出现异常，目前尚不清楚它何时会返回飞行。

“看起来他们在垫子上确实取得了非常好的进展，”赛勒斯说。 “我无法真正回答蓝色起源的时间表或 NASA 的发射台重建时间表，但我们被告知的一切，我们都在同一时间表上（2028 年）。”

这就留下了太空数据中心和月球上工作的机器人舰队的未来愿景，它们都在等待同一件事：更大的火箭。
